3154640.name: Package Stower VR
3154640.description:
Packages are coming down the conveyor belt and you need to put them into the correct storage containers. One comes every 3.5 seconds. Place a package in the correct bin, a green light flashes and you're closer to filling it up (blue light). Once you've filled 18 of 30 containers, you've beat the level. Storing a package in the wrong location will yield a red light and a score penalty. If not removed, it will make your job much more difficult. Careful though because correct packages falling out of a full container will mark it as unfull, and constant collisions means you'll have to put more into that container. Try to get as high of a score as you can!

Oh yeah... and every package you miss gets vaporized and counts against your score.

Score is calculated via this equation:

((Stow Rate - Incorrect Attempts)-(3 * Packages Destroyed)) / 2

Where Stow Rate = (Packages Correctly Stowed / Seconds) * 3600 --- Since this is an hourly rate I get
pkgs/second and multiply by 3600 to get pkgs/hr

For any major issues please text my paging system at 7082064882
3154640.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
